sections.heading: Before You Begin
sections.body:
Ensure that you enable generative AI features in the
**Organization Settings** page.

To enable this organization-level setting:

sections.heading: Steps
sections.body:
> **Note:** At your project-level settings in Atlas, you can toggle
> [Enable read-only tools in the MongoDB Assistant](de-read-only-tools).
> The setting defaults to 'on', but adheres to higher level AI features
> settings in each respective environment.
